# Tinker's Tools

- **Ability:** Dexterity
- **Utilize:** Assemble a Tiny item composed of scrap, which falls apart in 1 minute (DC 20)
- **Craft:** [[musket]], [[pistol]], [[bell]], [[bullseye_lantern]], [[flask]], [[hooded_lantern]], [[hunting_trap]], [[lock]], [[manacles]], [[mirror]], [[shovel]], [[signal_whistle]], [[tinderbox]]
